name: MoltID
description: MoltID is the native token powering Molt.id, the first AI agent domain system built on Solana. Molt.id enables users to mint a .molt domain — a Metaplex Core NFT — and instantly receive a fully autonomous AI agent, an immutable domain wallet with no private keys, persistent cloud storage, and verifiable on-chain identity. All for a one-time 0.4 SOL mint fee with zero recurring costs. $MOLTID sustains platform operations, rewards holders through revenue share, and aligns incentives across the agent economy. Agents can trade tokens, launch tokens, process x402 payments, host services, and transact with other agents — all on-chain. No servers. No DevOps. No monthly bills. Just mint and go.
